name_en: Ebetsu-Type Pottery Excavated from the Bozuyama Site
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of Ebetsu-type pottery excavated from the Bozuyama site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.
This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Okada warehouse. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Tomiiso shell mound. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Wakkanai City, located in Tomiiso.

name_romaji: Bunka Kansei no Koro no Soya Ezu

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a pictorial map of Soya from the Bunka-Kansei era. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Wakkanai City, located in Soya.

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the tsuba (sword guard) of Naito Gensuke's favorite sword. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Wakkanai City, located at the Hoppo Memorial Hall.
This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the Menashi alpine plant community. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Wakkanai City, located in Menashi.
This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the Mekuma Mongolian oak community. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Wakkanai City, located in Mashiho.
This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Soya Itsukushima Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Wakkanai City, located in Soya.

name_romaji: Kyū Kaigun Ōminato Tsūshintai Wakkanai Bunkentai Makubetsu Sōshinjo (B-tō)

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of Building B of the former navy Ominato Signal Corps Wakkanai detachment Makubetsu transmitting station. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Wakkanai City, located in Ehoku.

This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Jizo statue associated with Iida Jinbee. It is a town-designated cultural property of Nanae Town, designated on 1991-09-03.

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a pictorial map distinguishing public and private forest land. It is a town-designated cultural property of Nanae Town, designated on 2005-05-13.

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from the Hirosato site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at the Hokumoken Kitami Cultural Center, Koen-cho 1, Kitami City.

name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Nakanoshima Site
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from the Nakanoshima site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at the Hokumoken Kitami Cultural Center, Koen-cho 1, Kitami City.

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former clothing and provisions storehouse of the headquarters of the Notsukeushi tonden 4th Battalion 1st Company. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Ichiku 649-8, Tanno-cho, Kitami City.

This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Pierson Memorial Hall. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Saiwai-cho 7-chome 4-28, Kitami City.

This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Muka post station. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located at Takinoyu 127, Rubeshibe-cho, Kitami City.

name_romaji: Katakuri Oyobi Shūi no Hoppōsei Rakuyō Kōyōjurin
name_en: Dogtooth Violets and Surrounding Northern Deciduous Broadleaf Forest
description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of dogtooth violets (katakuri) and the surrounding northern deciduous broadleaf forest. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Kitami City, located in Tanno-cho, Kitami City.

name_romaji: Higashinaka Jinjō Kōtō Shōgakkō Goshin'ei Hōchisho

description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the imperial portrait repository of the Higashinaka ordinary higher elementary school. It is a town-designated cultural property of Kamifurano Town, designated on 1973-06-15, located at Higashi 8-sen Kita 18-go, Kamifurano Town.

This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the elm tree known as the Elm of Repose. It is a town-designated cultural property of Kamifurano Town, designated on 1980-02-26, located at Nishi 3-sen Kita 29-go, Kamifurano Town.
